rulings.Case Title: NELLIE BERTUCCI ET AL VS. ANGELIQUE TAVARES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 30, 2019 line 1. PLAINTIFFS NELLIE BERTUCCI, ROBERT BERTUCCI, WILLOW GRACE'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD GRANTED. No opposition filed. Counsel to prepare orders for each Plaintiff/Cross-Defendant separately. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT F ORTEGA VS. 790 POTRERO LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 30, 2019 line 2. PLAINTIFFs ROBERT ORTEGA, HEDY DILROSUN-ORTEGA, KELLEY CARROLL'S Motion To Compel Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One GRANTED. Defendant to provide complete verified responses without objections within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $660. Parties are instructed to calendar their discovery motions in department 301 at 9:00 a.m. in the future.= (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT F ORTEGA VS. 790 POTRERO LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories--General And Specially Prpared Interrogatories, Sets One
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 30, 2019 line 2. PLAINTIFFs ROBERT ORTEGA, HEDY DILROSUN-ORTEGA, KELLEY CARROLL'S Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories--General And Specially Prpared Interrogatories, Sets One GRANTED. Defendant to provide complete verified responses without objections within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $660. Parties are instructed to calendar their discovery motions in department 301 at 9:00 a.m. in the future. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: LAI FONG LEONG ET AL VS. CHAN 1985 TRUST ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Plaintiffs Motion To Compel Discovery To Chan 1985 Trust Responses To 1.) Form Interrogatories; 2.) Special Interrogatories; 3.) Request For Production Of Documents And 4.) Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 30, 2019 line 3. PLAINTIFFS LAI LEONG, DOROTHY LEONG'S Plaintiffs Motion To Compel Discovery To Chan 1985 Trust Responses To 1.) Form Interrogatories; 2.) Special Interrogatories; 3.) Request For Production Of Documents And 4.) Monetary Sanctions DENIED. Responses cannot be compelled from an entity that cannot be sued. Portico Management v. Harrison (2011) 202 Cal.App.4th 464. Parties are instructed to calendar their discovery motions in department 301 at 9:00 a.m. in the future. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CHRIS ROLIZ-MAGUIGAD VS. K5 FAMILY LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 30, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT K5 FAMILY's Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs GRANTED in the amount of $14,460 (36 hours at $400/hour; $60 filing fee). = (501/CFH)
